calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Julie Ho As Co-Trustee, Surcharge Of Trustee And For Attorney Fees.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Caserrly for Rachel Frost (Co-Trustee/Beneficiary).

Ms. Casserly explained the circumstances with regard to the property and stated that the Sister living in the home is not cooperating with vacating the premises. In addition, Ms. Casserly stated that they intend to renovate the property, sell it and make distribution. Furthermore, Ms. Casserly asked the Court to reserve the issue of Trustee fees and Attorney fees as well as the surcharge issue. The Court noted that no appearance was made by any objector and that there was no objection filed. The Court granted the Petition for Removal of Julie Ho as Co-Trustee (subject to reciept and review of the order). Ms. Ho is to remove herself and all of her possessions from the property within 60-days.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
